testcase.name: test_admin_global_stats_reflects_real_users_only

failure.message: AssertionError: missing user_count assert 'user_count' in {'users': 15, 'admins': 6, 'books': 3806, 'signups_7d': 5, 'signups_30d': 10, 'top_fandoms': [{'fandom': 'Star Trek', 'count': 458}, {'fandom': 'Stargate SG-1', 'count': 381}, {'fandom': 'Star Wars', 'count': 381}, {'fandom': 'Supernatural', 'count': 379}, {'fandom': 'MHA', 'count': 348}, {'fandom': 'Harry Potter', 'count': 336}, {'fandom': 'Spy x Family', 'count': 304}, {'fandom': 'Avatar', 'count': 281}, {'fandom': 'Frieren', 'count': 218}, {'fandom': 'Naruto', 'count': 142}], 'categories': {'Anthology': 328, 'Non-fiction': 302, 'Light Novel': 318, 'Screenplay': 311, 'Fanfiction': 280, 'Reference': 312, 'Translation': 347, 'Drama': 337, 'Poetry': 323, 'Web Novel': 321, 'Manga': 305, 'Original Fiction': 321, "Can't Open": 1}, 'total_storage_bytes': 5020}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter32_review.py:171: in test_admin_global_stats_reflects_real_users_only assert k in body, f"missing {k}" E AssertionError: missing user_count E assert 'user_count' in {'users': 15, 'admins': 6, 'books': 3806, 'signups_7d': 5, 'signups_30d': 10, 'top_fandoms': [{'fandom': 'Star Trek', 'count': 458}, {'fandom': 'Stargate SG-1', 'count': 381}, {'fandom': 'Star Wars', 'count': 381}, {'fandom': 'Supernatural', 'count': 379}, {'fandom': 'MHA', 'count': 348}, {'fandom': 'Harry Potter', 'count': 336}, {'fandom': 'Spy x Family', 'count': 304}, {'fandom': 'Avatar', 'count': 281}, {'fandom': 'Frieren', 'count': 218}, {'fandom': 'Naruto', 'count': 142}], 'categories': {'Anthology': 328, 'Non-fiction': 302, 'Light Novel': 318, 'Screenplay': 311, 'Fanfiction': 280, 'Reference': 312, 'Translation': 347, 'Drama': 337, 'Poetry': 323, 'Web Novel': 321, 'Manga': 305, 'Original Fiction': 321, "Can't Open": 1}, 'total_storage_bytes': 5020}
